$schema: Quest taxonomy vocabulary. Used by quest UI (filters, dropdowns, tooltips) and AI generator prompts. Edit to add/rename/remove taxonomy entries.
$note: Slugs are snake_case and stable — used as keys in quest.data. Labels and descriptions are user-facing and safe to edit.

scopes.label: Hook only
scopes.description: A seed — a one-sentence idea, not yet developed.

scopes.label: Single encounter
scopes.description: One scene (combat, social, puzzle), typically under an hour.

scopes.label: One-shot
scopes.description: A complete story resolved in a single session.

scopes.label: Side quest
scopes.description: A small, self-contained quest with a clear goal, 2-4 scenes.

scopes.label: Multi-session
scopes.description: A full adventure arc running across several sessions.

scopes.label: Campaign arc
scopes.description: A large story spanning months, often built from several quests.

scopes.label: Sandbox rumor
scopes.description: Passive world lore — activates only if the players go digging.

quest_types.label: Rescue
quest_types.description: Save a person or group from captivity or danger.

quest_types.label: Investigation
quest_types.description: Work out what happened — a murder, disappearance, or mystery.

quest_types.label: Escort
quest_types.description: Protect a person or caravan all the way to a destination.

quest_types.label: Delivery
quest_types.description: Carry something from A to B, often through danger.

quest_types.label: Monster problem
quest_types.description: A creature plagues the area — kill, capture, or drive it off.

quest_types.label: Missing person
quest_types.description: An NPC has vanished — find out where and why.

quest_types.label: Political intrigue
quest_types.description: Power games between factions — pick a side or manipulate them.

quest_types.label: Heist
quest_types.description: Steal a specific object from a guarded location.

quest_types.label: Exploration
quest_types.description: Map or explore an unknown region.

quest_types.label: Diplomacy
quest_types.description: Negotiate between feuding parties.

quest_types.label: Curse / haunting
quest_types.description: Break a curse or lay a haunted place to rest.

quest_types.label: Ancient ruin
quest_types.description: Explore an old site and harvest its secrets.

quest_types.label: Faction conflict
quest_types.description: Active conflict between two or more factions.

quest_types.label: Revenge
quest_types.description: Personal vengeance — often with moral grey zones.

quest_types.label: Moral dilemma
quest_types.description: No clean good answer — every choice carries a cost.

quest_types.label: Survival
quest_types.description: Survive harsh nature, hunger, cold, or pursuing enemies.

quest_types.label: Siege / defense
quest_types.description: Defend a place against a superior force or a siege.

quest_types.label: Mystery
quest_types.description: A structured investigation quest with clues and a reveal.

quest_types.label: Treasure hunt
quest_types.description: Find a specific treasure from clues, maps, or rumors.

quest_types.label: Pilgrimage
quest_types.description: A religious or spiritual journey to a sacred place.

tones.label: Grim
tones.description: Dark, harsh, cynical — the world is not fair.

tones.label: Heroic
tones.description: Classic adventure — good stands against evil.

tones.label: Folkloric
tones.description: Inspired by folk tales — talking animals, threes, omens.

tones.label: Gothic
tones.description: Ghosts, castles, old sins, a heavy atmosphere.

tones.label: Sword & sorcery
tones.description: Pulp style — barbaric heroes, cult magic, fast action.

tones.label: Political
tones.description: Court intrigue, alliances, betrayal, social maneuvering.

tones.label: Low fantasy
tones.description: Rare magic, a grounded medieval setting.

tones.label: Dark fairy tale
tones.description: Fairy tales with teeth — innocent victims, macabre solutions.

tones.label: Comedic
tones.description: Humor, parody, slapstick — a quest with a laugh factor.

environments.label: Village
environments.description: A small village — a tight-knit community.

environments.label: City
environments.description: A large city with many districts, factions, and crowds.

environments.label: Road
environments.description: On the journey — the road between destinations.

environments.label: Forest
environments.description: Woods — bright or dark, magical or mundane.

environments.label: Swamp
environments.description: Boggy, dark, full of rot and danger.

environments.label: Coast
environments.description: By the sea — beaches, cliffs, harbors, smugglers.

environments.label: Dungeon
environments.description: An underground complex — traps, monsters, treasure.

environments.label: Ruin
environments.description: Overgrown remains of an earlier civilization.

environments.label: Temple
environments.description: A sacred site — active or abandoned, often guarded.

environments.label: Castle
environments.description: A fortress or keep — guarded and hierarchical.

environments.label: Underworld
environments.description: Underground cities — drow, duergar, deep tunnels.

environments.label: Fey realm
environments.description: The Feywild — skewed rules, seduction, eternal twilight.

environments.label: Shadow realm
environments.description: The Shadowfell — death, an echo of the living world.

environments.label: Planar location
environments.description: Another plane — elemental, infernal, paradise, and the like.

primary_challenges.label: Combat
primary_challenges.description: The quest is resolved mainly through combat.

primary_challenges.label: Investigation
primary_challenges.description: Piece together clues to uncover the truth.

primary_challenges.label: Exploration
primary_challenges.description: Navigate unknown territory, map it, discover.

primary_challenges.label: Puzzle
primary_challenges.description: Logical or mechanical puzzles must be solved.

primary_challenges.label: Survival
primary_challenges.description: Endure hunger, weather, disease, or exhaustion.

primary_challenges.label: Moral choice
primary_challenges.description: The quest's climax is a hard ethical decision.

primary_challenges.label: Stealth
primary_challenges.description: Avoid detection, slip past guards, infiltrate.

primary_challenges.label: Resource management
primary_challenges.description: Limited resources — arrows, food, light, magic.

primary_challenges.label: Race against time
primary_challenges.description: A hard deadline — delays carry consequences.

primary_challenges.label: Negotiation
primary_challenges.description: Bargaining between two or more parties.

primary_challenges.label: Travel hazard
primary_challenges.description: The journey itself is dangerous — not just the destination.

antagonist_types.label: Monster
antagonist_types.description: One or more monsters are the primary threat.

antagonist_types.label: Cult
antagonist_types.description: A secret religious group with hidden goals.

antagonist_types.label: Noble
antagonist_types.description: An aristocratic opponent — power, influence, the law.

antagonist_types.label: Merchant faction
antagonist_types.description: A guild, company, or trading house with economic power.

antagonist_types.label: Rival adventurers
antagonist_types.description: Another adventuring party chasing the same goal.

antagonist_types.label: Cursed spirit
antagonist_types.description: A ghost, banshee, or revenant — a bound soul.

antagonist_types.label: Ancient evil
antagonist_types.description: A forgotten power awakening — a lich, demon prince, sleeping dragon.

antagonist_types.label: Corrupt official
antagonist_types.description: A mayor, sheriff, or judge abusing their position.

antagonist_types.label: Desperate commoners
antagonist_types.description: Ordinary people driven to extremes — sympathetic.

antagonist_types.label: Outsider entity
antagonist_types.description: From another plane — demon, devil, aberration, fey lord.

antagonist_types.label: Misunderstood creature
antagonist_types.description: Seems like a monster, but has a sympathetic motive.

antagonist_types.label: Natural disaster
antagonist_types.description: Storm, flood, earthquake, plague — no 'enemy' to defeat.

antagonist_types.label: Internal betrayal
antagonist_types.description: An ally or quest-giver is a traitor.
